_comment: Pinned hashes for the QC precomputed-predictions parity fixture (GBM + SP500-universe, AAPL anchor). See docs/references/quantconnect-precomputed-predictions.md and tests/fixtures/golden/qc-precomputed-predictions/attribution.md for context. run_ledger_prediction_set_hash equals prediction_set_hash by design — the runner threads the manifest's top-level hash unchanged. result_hash repinned on 2026-05-27 because BacktestRunResult gained a new structural field bars_consumed (default 0) — the canonical-JSON dump now appends "bars_consumed":0, changing the SHA-256 even though the run semantics are unchanged. Previous pin (pre-bars_consumed): 2585aadb0e9a22e0b7da4b0b62d4b027acdbaf97695bdff452cc7aa1b23f8446.
